meta.purpose: Reusable prototype test report templates for validating first-generation IoTEdges products before exact specifications are published in SEO product pages.
meta.important_note: These templates define what should be tested and recorded. They do not prove capability by themselves. Capability status should be updated only after real prototype test records, component evidence and engineering approval exist.

result_values.pass: Test passed and can be used as evidence.
result_values.conditional_pass: Test passed with limitation or follow-up required.
result_values.fail: Test failed and the related claim must not be published.
result_values.blocked: Test could not be completed because hardware, firmware or equipment was unavailable.

claim_release_rule.planning_claim: Can use designed for, planned, target or under validation wording.
claim_release_rule.validated_claim: Can publish exact specification only after the matching template result is pass and reviewed_by is filled.
claim_release_rule.failed_claim: If result is fail or blocked, do not publish exact specification.

templates.title: Digital Input Prototype Test Report
templates.purpose: Validate digital input state detection, dry/wet contact behavior, debounce behavior and optional pulse input behavior.
required_equipment: dry contact switch or relay simulator
signal generator if pulse mode is implemented
Modbus master test tool or local web UI
preconditions: Test register map or UI point mapping is documented.
test_steps: Record model code, hardware revision and firmware version.
Connect each DI channel as dry contact and toggle open/closed state.
Record reported DI state for each channel.
If wet contact is implemented, apply low, nominal and high input voltage within target range.
Record threshold behavior and any unstable state.
If debounce is implemented, simulate contact bounce and record filtered state behavior.
If pulse mode is implemented, apply pulse signals at planned frequencies and record counter accuracy.
Power cycle the device and confirm DI configuration and state reporting recover correctly.
acceptance_criteria: Every implemented DI channel reports correct open/closed state.
No unstable state appears at nominal input condition.
Wet contact thresholds are documented if wet input is supported.
Pulse mode meets the recorded test frequency if pulse mode is published.
Configuration survives power cycle if configurable modes are implemented.
seo_claims_unlocked_after_pass: pulse input support only if pulse test passes

templates.title: Relay Output Prototype Test Report
templates.purpose: Validate relay output switching, readback, failsafe behavior, startup state and load behavior.
required_equipment: rated test load after relay component is selected
Modbus master test tool or local web UI
preconditions: Relay or output component is selected.
PCB clearance and terminal design are reviewed.
Firmware supports output write and readback.
test_steps: Record relay component part number and rating from datasheet.
Switch each output on and off with no load and record readback.
Switch each output with planned test load and record behavior.
Run repeated switching sample test for the selected load class.
Measure terminal or relay area temperature rise under sustained load.
Test startup output state after power cycle.
Test failsafe output state after communication timeout.
Record any contact sticking, delayed switching or unstable behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Every implemented output follows command and readback behavior.
No unsafe temperature rise is observed under validated load.
Startup and failsafe behavior match firmware specification.
Output rating claim is supported by component datasheet and prototype test evidence.
seo_claims_unlocked_after_pass: exact relay rating only if component, PCB and load test evidence all pass

templates.title: Analog Input Prototype Test Report
templates.purpose: Validate analog input mode, raw value mapping, scaling, accuracy, stability and fault detection.
required_equipment: calibrated voltage source if voltage mode is implemented
Modbus master test tool or local web UI
temperature chamber if temperature-range accuracy will be claimed
preconditions: Firmware raw unit and scaling formula are documented.
Register map or UI point mapping is documented.
test_steps: Record analog circuit component part numbers.
Apply 4mA, 12mA and 20mA to each current input channel.
Record raw value, scaled value and measurement error.
If voltage mode is implemented, apply 0V, 5V and 10V to each voltage input channel.
Record raw value, scaled value and measurement error.
Run stability test at a fixed input value for a defined duration.
Test under-range, over-range and open-circuit behavior if supported.
Run temperature drift test only if temperature-wide accuracy will be published.
acceptance_criteria: Each implemented AI channel reports expected raw and scaled values.
Measured error is within accepted engineering target.
Input value remains stable under steady input.
Fault status works if fault detection is claimed.
Calibration method is documented if accuracy is published.
seo_claims_unlocked_after_pass: analog accuracy only if measured and approved

templates.title: Analog Output Prototype Test Report
templates.purpose: Validate analog output setpoint behavior, output accuracy, load capability, startup value and failsafe value.
required_equipment: current loop load resistor or calibrated loop meter
voltage load if voltage mode is implemented
Modbus master test tool or local web UI
preconditions: Output mode and load target are defined.
Firmware supports AO setpoint write and readback.
test_steps: Record output driver component part numbers.
Write 0%, 50% and 100% setpoints for voltage output if implemented.
Measure physical voltage output and record error.
Write 4mA, 12mA and 20mA setpoints for current output if implemented.
Measure physical current output and record error.
Test output under planned load condition.
Power cycle device and record startup output state.
Trigger communication timeout and record failsafe output value.
acceptance_criteria: Each implemented AO channel follows commanded setpoint.
Measured output error is within accepted engineering target.
Output remains stable under planned load.
Startup and failsafe values match firmware specification.
seo_claims_unlocked_after_pass: AO accuracy only if measured and approved

templates.title: RS485 Modbus Prototype Test Report
templates.purpose: Validate RS485 Modbus communication, baud rate options, multi-drop behavior, retry behavior and isolation/protection evidence.
required_equipment: Modbus RTU master or slave simulator
at least three RS485 nodes for multi-drop test
oscilloscope if signal integrity is reviewed
isolation/protection test equipment if exact rating will be claimed
preconditions: RS485 transceiver and isolation design are selected.
Termination and bias strategy is documented.
test_steps: Record RS485 transceiver and isolator part numbers.
Test Modbus communication at each supported baud rate.
Test parity options if configurable.
Run multi-drop communication with at least three nodes.
Test timeout, retry and recovery behavior.
Test termination/bias settings according to design.
Run isolation, ESD or surge test only with proper equipment and safety procedure.
Record communication error counters during sustained polling.
acceptance_criteria: Supported baud rates communicate reliably under test conditions.
Multi-drop test remains stable under sustained polling.
Timeout and retry behavior matches firmware specification.
Exact isolation or surge claim is published only after matching test evidence exists.
seo_claims_unlocked_after_pass: isolation rating only if isolation test passes

templates.title: Ethernet Prototype Test Report
templates.purpose: Validate Ethernet connectivity, DHCP/static IP, Modbus TCP, MQTT, local web UI and network recovery behavior.
preconditions: MQTT and Modbus TCP firmware features are enabled where applicable.
test_steps: Test DHCP address acquisition.
Test static IP configuration.
Run Modbus TCP communication test if model supports Modbus TCP.
Run MQTT connection and publish test if model supports MQTT.
Access local web UI if implemented.
Disconnect and reconnect Ethernet cable and record recovery behavior.
Run sustained network communication for a defined duration.
acceptance_criteria: DHCP and static IP work as specified.
Modbus TCP works if claimed.
MQTT publish works if claimed.
Network reconnect recovers without manual power cycle.
Local web UI is reachable if claimed.
claims_still_blocked_without_extra_tests: industrial Ethernet protocol support beyond Modbus TCP

templates.title: Power Input Prototype Test Report
templates.purpose: Validate DC power input range, startup behavior, brownout recovery, reverse polarity protection and burn-in stability.
required_equipment: event logger or firmware diagnostic log
test_steps: Power up device at minimum target voltage.
Power up device at nominal voltage.
Power up device at maximum target voltage.
Run communication and IO sanity test at each voltage.
Perform short power interruption and brownout recovery test.
Perform reverse polarity protection test according to safe lab procedure.
Run 24-hour burn-in at nominal voltage and record resets or faults.
acceptance_criteria: Device starts and operates across validated voltage range.
Device recovers from short power interruption.
Reverse polarity protection works according to design.
No unexpected reset or unsafe temperature rise during burn-in.
seo_claims_unlocked_after_pass: watchdog or recovery wording if tested

templates.title: IEG-100 Modbus to MQTT Prototype Test Report
templates.purpose: Validate gateway Modbus RTU/TCP polling, MQTT connection, telemetry payload schema, reconnect behavior and configured capacity targets.
test_steps: Configure one Modbus RTU slave and verify polling.
Configure one Modbus TCP slave and verify polling.
Configure MQTT broker and verify connection.
Verify telemetry topic and payload fields.
Test broker disconnect and reconnect behavior.
Test offline buffering if local cache is implemented.
Run configured point-count and device-count stability test.
Record sequence numbers, point quality and device status behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Gateway reads configured Modbus RTU and TCP points.
Gateway publishes MQTT telemetry with required fields.
Gateway reconnects after broker/network interruption.
Point quality reflects offline or invalid point behavior.
Published capacity claims match tested device and point count.
seo_claims_unlocked_after_pass: Modbus RTU/TCP to MQTT gateway behavior
store-and-forward only if cache test passes
claims_still_blocked_without_extra_tests: remote write/control unless command safety test passes

evidence_update_workflow: Run the matching prototype test template on real hardware.
Save completed report as a dated engineering record.
Attach or reference component datasheets where electrical ratings are involved.
Have an engineering reviewer approve the result.
Update first-product-capability-validation-checklist.json evidence_available with the completed report filename.
Move the related check from blocked or conditional to pass only when all required evidence exists.
Update public product page briefs only after claim status is pass or safe conditional wording is defined.
next_actions: Create a completed-report folder convention when real prototype tests begin.
Turn PTR-DI-001, PTR-RELAY-001, PTR-AI-001, PTR-RS485-001 and PTR-GW-MQTT-001 into spreadsheet forms if the engineering team prefers tabular testing.
Use these templates before drafting exact specifications for IEIO-100, IER-100 and IEG-100 product pages.
